'''kathana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalatrophy|encephalatrophy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalatrophy|encephalatrophy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kathana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæthænæth|kæthænæth]] || [[word:kæthænæj|kæthænæj]] || [[word:kæthænæsh|kæthænæsh]] || [[word:kæthænæ|kæthænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kathathanath|kathathanath]] || [[word:kathathanaj|kathathanaj]] || [[word:kathathanash|kathathanash]] || [[word:kathathana|kathathana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kathanath|kathanath]] || [[word:kathanaj|kathanaj]] || [[word:kathanash|kathanash]] || [[word:kathana|kathana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kathafnath|kathafnath]] || [[word:kathafnaj|kathafnaj]] || [[word:kathafnash|kathafnash]] || [[word:kathafnaf|kathafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kathanatha|kathanatha]] || [[word:kathanaja|kathanaja]] || [[word:kathanasha|kathanasha]] || [[word:kathanaka|kathanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kathanath|kathanath]] || [[word:kathanaj|kathanaj]] || [[word:kathanash|kathanash]] || [[word:kathana|kathana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kathanathal|kathanathal]] || [[word:kathanajal|kathanajal]] || [[word:kathanashal|kathanashal]] || [[word:kathanakal|kathanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kathanathatha|kathanathatha]] || [[word:kathanajaja|kathanajaja]] || [[word:kathanashasha|kathanashasha]] || [[word:kathanaka|kathanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kathanathan|kathanathan]] || [[word:kathanajan|kathanajan]] || [[word:kathanashan|kathanashan]] || [[word:kathanakan|kathanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kathanathaoro|kathanathaoro]] || [[word:kathanajaoro|kathanajaoro]] || [[word:kathanashaoro|kathanashaoro]] || [[word:kathanakaoro|kathanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
